title: Electronic Purchase and Social Media Auction Licensing Requirements
summary: Requires auctioneers selling goods or providing services via social media to apply for a commercial activity licence and display the commercial registration number on auction-site social media accounts.

theme_notes.digital_economy.ecommerce: Licensing requirements for online auctions through social media.
theme_notes.digital_economy.online_platforms: Licensing requirements for auction activity conducted through social media platforms.
theme_notes.online_content.online_media_licensing: Licensing requirements for commercial activity conducted on social media.
theme_notes.online_content.online_advertising_influe: Rules for commercial auctions conducted through social media.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (decision?). Related instruments: Related to Commercial Registration framework and e-commerce activity licensing
